_publications._publicationTitle: MEK Inhibition Enhances the Antitumor Effect of Radiotherapy in NF1-Deficient Glioblastoma.

_contextSnippet: three as NF1 deficient (JHH-136, JHH-520, JHH-1016B)...intact MGMT expression was associated with resistance...NF1-deficient heterotopic xenografts (JHH-520 and JHH-136) exhibited decreased growth
details: NF1-deficient line with intact MGMT expression showing resistance to TMZ but decreased tumor growth in xenograft models with MEKi plus radiation
